task: Browse the upcoming SuperBike events taking place in Italy.
thoughts: I see the Red Bull homepage with a cookie consent banner. Let me first dismiss that, then navigate to the Events section.
Good, the cookie banner is dismissed. Now let me click on "Events" in the navigation bar.
I'm on the Events page. I can see various events listed. I need to find SuperBike events in Italy. Let me scroll down to see if there are any filters or search options available.
I can see some event categories. I need to find SuperBike events specifically. Let me continue scrolling to see if there are more event categories or a way to search/filter by sport type.

I can see a "Find Events by Interest" section with filters. Currently it's filtered to "United States of America". I need to change the country filter to Italy and look for SuperBike events. Let me first change the country by clicking on the "United States of America" filter to remove it, then select Italy.
Good, the US filter has been removed. Now I can see "All locations" and "All disciplines" dropdowns. Let me click on "All locations" to select Italy.
A location dropdown has appeared with a search box. Let me type "Italy" to find it quickly.
A location dropdown has appeared with a search box. Let me type "Italy" to find it quickly.
I can see "Italy" appearing in the dropdown. Let me click on it to select it.

Italy is now selected as the location filter. I can see events are already showing for Italy. Let me close this dropdown by clicking elsewhere, and then I need to also filter by discipline to find SuperBike events. Let me click somewhere to close the location dropdown first.

The filter is now set to Italy and I can see the first event "Drift Masters – Italy" (Drifting, May 2). Now I need to also filter by discipline to find SuperBike events specifically. Let me click on "All disciplines" dropdown to search for SuperBike.
The disciplines dropdown didn't open. Let me click directly on the "All disciplines" button.
I can see the "All disciplines" button is highlighted (with the green clickable overlay). Let me click directly on it to open the dropdown.
The dropdown isn't opening. Let me scroll up slightly to make sure I can see the filter bar properly, then try clicking on the discipline filter button.
Now I can see the filter bar at the bottom. Let me click on the "All disciplines" dropdown.
It seems like the dropdown is starting to open at the bottom. Let me scroll down a bit to see it fully.
The disciplines dropdown is now open with a search field. Let me type "SuperBike" to find it.
The disciplines dropdown is now open with a search field. Let me type "SuperBike" to find it.
It seems the text didn't go into the search field. Let me click directly on the "Find a discipline" input field and then type.
Let me try clicking directly in the search input field and typing.

Let me try to scroll down in the dropdown to look for SuperBike, or I could try scrolling the list of disciplines. But first, let me try to type in the search field by clicking directly on the text placeholder.
Now I can see the search input field highlighted in orange (typeable). Let me click on it and type "SuperBike".
Now I can see the search input field highlighted in orange (typeable). Let me click on it and type "SuperBike".
The text isn't appearing in the field. Let me try scrolling down through the disciplines list to find SuperBike manually.

The dropdown scrolled and I can see more disciplines: Alpine Snowboarding, Art, Athletics, BASE Jumping, Baseball. I need to keep scrolling to find SuperBike. Let me continue scrolling within the dropdown.
I can see more disciplines: Canoeing, Cliff Diving, Climbing, Cricket, Cycling. I need to keep scrolling to find SuperBike.
I can see F1, Festival, Film, Fitness Training, Fixed Gear. I need to continue scrolling down to reach "S" for SuperBike.
I can see Ice Hockey, Inline Skating, Ironman, Junior Formula Series, Karting. I'm getting closer to "S". Let me keep scrolling down.
I can see Mountain Bike, Mountain Running, MTB Enduro, Music, Netball. Getting closer to "S". Let me keep scrolling.
I can see Rodeo, Rowing, Rugby, Running, Sailing. Almost at "Su" - let me scroll a bit more.
I can see Snowboarding, Snowkiting, Snowmobile, Soapbox Race, and Soccer (Football) is partially visible. SuperBike should be just below. Let me scroll a bit more.
I can see Spinning, Squash, Stockcar, Study. SuperBike should be just below. Let me scroll a tiny bit more.
I can see "Superbike" in the list! Let me click on it to select it.
It seems the checkbox didn't get checked. Let me try clicking more precisely on the "Superbike" checkbox.
Let me try clicking directly on the checkbox for Superbike.
I can see the checkbox items clearly now with green outlines. Let me click directly on the Superbike checkbox.

Excellent! "Superbike" is now selected (checked) and I can see the filter bar now shows "Italy" and "Superbike" as active filters. The "Upcoming" tab appears to be active. Let me close this dropdown by clicking elsewhere and then see the filtered results.

I can see the filters are set to "Italy" and "Superbike", and the currently active tab appears to be "Upcoming" which shows "Sorry! No results found." This means there are no upcoming Superbike events in Italy. Let me check the "All" tab to see if there are any Superbike events in Italy listed (including past ones), which would confirm the filter is working correctly.
The "All" tab also shows no results. Let me try clicking specifically on the "All" tab to make sure it's selected.

I can now clearly see the "All" tab is selected (it appears with a slightly different background), and both filters "Italy" and "Superbike" are active. The page shows **"Sorry! No results found."** with the message "Choose different settings and try again!"

This means there are currently no SuperBike events listed in Italy on Red Bull's events page — neither upcoming, past, nor any at all. Let me verify by trying just the "Upcoming" tab to confirm.
